gp_payload:
rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb⟩
rcases h₁ with hb_le_a
have h_nonneg : b ≥ 0 := by linarith
have h1 : 0 < a := ha
have h2 : 0 < b := hb
have h_sq_nonneg : (a - b)^2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
calc
    (a + b) / 2 - Real.sqrt (a * b) = ((a - b)^2) / (4 * ((a + b) / 2 + Real.sqrt (a * b))) := by
      nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ a * b from mul_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity))]
    _ ≤ ((a - b)^2) / (4 * (2 * Real.sqrt (a * b))) := by
      refine (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left ?_ (by positivity) (by positivity)).mpr ?_
      nlinarith
    _ = ((a - b)^2) / (8 * Real.sqrt (a * b)) := by ring
    _ ≤ ((a - b)^2) / (8 * b) := by
      refine (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left ?_ (by positivity) (by nlinarith)).mpr ?_
      nlinarith
    _ = (a - b)^2 / (8 * b) := by ring
